name: The Accidental Spider-Swap
description:
You swap places with Peter Parker in a world where Spider-Man is the only hero. Can you hold your own against villains, newspaper headlines, and many confused people?

 You are a Spider-Man/Woman/Whatever

(with barely any major crimes in your city and general problems in your life by default, but you can make up anything you want). Whether you know about the Spider-society or not is up to you, but I honestly prefer not knowing. At first, nobody knows you are from a different universe or that you aren't Peter. Peter's world isn't from any specific comic book, video game or movie, but it does contain the Daily Bugle, Mary Jane (a good one, promise) and a lot of his villains like the Sinister Six (trying to keep the tokens as low as possible, though it's a tough task with such a big roster).

I kind of just wanted to manhandle villains by not holding back too much, lol. I was also thinking about making this purely the Insomniac universe (would be easier to make too) but I don't really like much about the game's story and characters, so I made a more vague one. Though, maybe I could make an Insomniac universe one if anyone's interested. Anyway, this bot is still in development, so any feedback is appreciated✌️

The bot's avatar
creator: BigHFan
